mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sim_webhook_logs ( execution_id, workflow_id, workspace_id, status, duration_ms, cost_usd, request_body, signature, signature_valid, processed, error_message, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{executionId}, #{workflowId}, #{workspaceId}, #{status}, #{durationMs}, #{costUsd}, #{requestBody}, #{signature}, #{signatureValid}, #{processed}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sim_webhook_logs SET signature_valid = #{signatureValid}, processed = #{processed}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
